> **For critical vulnerabilities, do NOT use this template.**
> Email **security@gatewarden.eu** directly. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

## Summary

Brief description of the security issue.

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (remote exploitation, credential exposure)
- [ ] High (privilege escalation, auth bypass)
- [ ] Medium (information disclosure, DoS)
- [ ] Low (minor issue, hardening recommendation)

## Affected Component

- [ ] CLI (`nexus-link` binary)
- [ ] Agent (`nexus-link-agent`)
- [ ] Service (`nexus-link-service`)
- [ ] Core library (`nexus-link-core`)
- [ ] Installer (`install.sh`)
- [ ] Docker image

What could an attacker achieve?

If you have a recommendation for fixing this issue.
